result.reason: Critical data loss bug where user configuration is lost after multiple save operations and system hibernation.
result.approach: Investigate the configuration saving and loading mechanisms, focusing on file I/O robustness, file locking, and handling of application lifecycle events, especially around system hibernation. Analyze potential conflicts or race conditions when multiple save/export operations occur. Implement atomic save operations and/or backup mechanisms to ensure data integrity.
